name: Whiskara
short_description: Whiskara is an action role-playing game where Lyra has to stop the god Hypnos from taking over the world
detailed_description:
Notice

As of June 6th 2025, development of this project has ceased, and future update cannot be promised


About the Game

Story

Lyra awakens to a bewildering discovery: her father’s legendary sword lies on her table. Confused and worried, she rushes to ask her father what it means, only to discover that he’s been cursed by the god, Hypnos. With her father too weak to fight, Lyra must find and defeat Hypnos before it is too late.

Features

  • Combat System: A combat system including a light and heavy attack. The inclusion of stamina also adds a whole new layer to the combat, light attacks deal less damage but conserve stamina, while heavy attacks deal more damage but drain a lot of stamina.

  • Skill Levels: Whiskara features a skill level system. Right now it allows the player to increase their skill in speech, allowing dialogue with some characters to unlock alternate ways to do quests.

  • Save System: The game will save upon quest completion, and Steam Cloud will back up the saves.
